# `compose_scroll`

Scroll a scrollable container to bring content into view.
Identify the container using its element ID or text.
Leave all identifiers empty to scroll the first scrollable container found.

## Source

- Kind: class-backed
- Class: `xyz.block.trailblaze.compose.driver.tools.ComposeScrollTool`

## Contract

- Visible to LLM: yes (`surface_to_llm: true`)
- Recordable: yes (`is_recordable: true`)
- Host-only: no (`requires_host: false`)

## Input schema

### Optional parameters

- `elementId` — `String`
  Element ID from the view hierarchy, e.g., 'e2'.
- `testTag` — `String`
  Accessibility identifier of the scrollable container.
- `text` — `String`
  The text content to scroll towards.
- `index` — `Integer`
  Index to scroll to within the scrollable container. Defaults to 0.

## Output

Returns: `string` (opaque text content)

Typed result schemas (`kind: query | action`, MCP `structuredContent`) are not yet carried by the resolved manifest — this section will gain detail when that lands.
